The '''Cularin Compact''' was a negotiated agreement which ended the [[Tarasin Revolt]] between the native [[Tarasin]] and off-[[Planet/Legends|world]] developers, including the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].<ref name="LFC">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==History==
The Tarasin Revolt began in [[161 BBY/Legends|161 BBY]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. After several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of conflict, negotiations were attempted by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] for [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after two [[Jedi Consular]]s from the [[Almas Academy]] attempted to bring about peace and secure the stability of the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. After several fruitless months of discussion, an agreement was finally reached in [[154 BBY]].<ref name="LFC" />

The compact itself outlined protected rights of the native Tarasin and sharply curtailed the off-[[Planet/Legends|world]] companies' ability to harm the planet's ecosystem with their business ventures involving the planet's natural resources. The treaty also protected the local fauna, including the [[Kilassin]].<ref name="LFC" />

Though peace came slowly, the native Tarasin and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] began to work together to harvest the planet's resources while protecting the delicate ecological balance of the planet.<ref name="LFC" />
